summary: Good recording despite out‑of‑phase issue, which is fixed for a clear listening experience
review: The sole reviewer notes that the two stereo channels are initially out of phase—a problem seen on the first two nights from this source—but after applying a fix the recordings sound pretty awesome. No comments were made about the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, focusing on a technical flaw that is later corrected; no musical commentary to boost or lower the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Channels are out of phase in the original mix; after fixing the phase issue the sound is clear and enjoyable.
